name: NEW ASIAN EXPRESS

violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove foil from pot rack and from serving window shelf.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers including shelving in walk in cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all storage shelves in kitchen area.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean vent hood filters.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire kitchen needs thorough cleaning.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Repair counter by front hand wash sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen and in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire facility needs deep cleaned.

source_address: 2200 N MAPLE AVE UNIT 608, Rapid City
